basicOps.addStepDesc: Click a step type from the left panel. New steps appear at canvas center.
basicOps.selectNodeDesc: Left-click a node to open the property panel on the right.
basicOps.moveNodeDesc: Drag a node to a new position with left click.
basicOps.panDesc: Middle click or right-click drag to pan the canvas.
basicOps.zoomDesc: Use mouse wheel to zoom, or +/- buttons at bottom-left.
basicOps.fitViewDesc: Click 'Fit' button at bottom-left to center all nodes.

connectionOps.connectDesc: Drag from the bottom dot of one node to the top dot of another.
connectionOps.deleteEdgeDesc: Click an edge to highlight, press Backspace or Delete to remove.
connectionOps.changeOrderDesc: Delete old edge, then drag from source to new target.
connectionOps.startNodeDesc: Green start marker. Drag its edge to any step node to set entry point.

selectionOps.boxSelectDesc: Left-click drag on empty canvas to create selection box.
selectionOps.selectAllDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + A to select all nodes.
selectionOps.copyDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + C to copy selected nodes.
selectionOps.pasteDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + V to paste copied nodes.
selectionOps.duplicateDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + D to duplicate current selected step.
selectionOps.deleteNodeDesc: Press Backspace or Delete with node selected.

saveRunOps.manualSaveDesc: Click save button or Cmd/Ctrl + S.
saveRunOps.autoSaveDesc: Auto-save after 2 seconds of editing. Save status shown in toolbar.
saveRunOps.runScriptDesc: Click 'Run' button, select environments, then execute.
saveRunOps.cancelRunDesc: Click 'Cancel' button during execution to stop.

propertyOps.editPropsDesc: Click node to modify parameters in right panel.
propertyOps.resizePanelDesc: Drag left edge of panel to adjust width.
propertyOps.insertVarDesc: Variable button in text fields inserts {{variableName}}.
propertyOps.selectorTypeDesc: Supports CSS, XPath, and Text element locators.

controlFlowOps.conditionDesc: Condition nodes have then/else outputs connecting to different steps.
controlFlowOps.loopDesc: Loop nodes have body (loop content) and next (after loop) outputs.
controlFlowOps.dialogDesc: Confirm dialog nodes define multiple buttons, each with its own branch.

fields.booleanHint: AI outputs true/false for conditional branching.
fields.percentHint: AI outputs 0-100 percentage for threshold judgment.
fields.title: Title

save.retryHint: Save failed, will retry on next auto-save
